summary: The diff implements comprehensive early 2000s athletic/sports visual accents blended into the existing 1970s retro theme. All six acceptance criteria for REQ-13 appear to be addressed: bold condensed athletic font (Barlow Condensed) is added, jersey-style numerals are used for issue numbers and page indicators, multiple diagonal stripe dividers are rendered in CSS, sport-white and sport-navy color tokens are introduced, navigation hover effects include a swoosh underline treatment, and the overall aesthetic preserves the 1970s newsprint base while adding sporty energy.
